name: UploadTrigger

parameters.name: OnFilesSelected
parameters.description: Files chosen in the picker. Fires once per picker confirmation; the consumer is responsible for any subsequent state / upload logic.

parameters.name: Multiple
parameters.description: Allow multiple files. Maps to the native picker's multi-select.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: MIME-type / extension filter passed to accept=. E.g. "image/*", ".pdf,.docx". Null = no filter.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant. Matches the corresponding Button variant so the trigger composes visually with surrounding buttons.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Size. Matches the corresponding Button size.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Trigger label. Falls back to localized "Pick a file" when null. Ignored if ChildContent is provided.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Custom leading icon. Defaults to Lucide.Upload.

events.name: OnFilesSelected
events.description: Files chosen in the picker. Fires once per picker confirmation; the consumer is responsible for any subsequent state / upload logic.

examples.title: Basic Trigger
examples.code:
<UploadTrigger Text="Upload file" OnFilesSelected="@HandleFiles" />

@code {
    private void HandleFiles(InputFileChangeEventArgs e)
    {
        // read e.File / e.GetMultipleFiles() and upload
    }
}

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<UploadTrigger Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Default" Text="Default" OnFilesSelected="@HandleFiles" />
<UploadTrigger Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Secondary" Text="Secondary" OnFilesSelected="@HandleFiles" />
<UploadTrigger Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Text="Outline" OnFilesSelected="@HandleFiles" />
<UploadTrigger Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Text="Ghost" OnFilesSelected="@HandleFiles" />

examples.title: Accept Filter and Multiple
examples.code:
<UploadTrigger Text="Pick images" Accept="image/*" Multiple="true" OnFilesSelected="@HandleFiles" />
<UploadTrigger Text="Pick a PDF" Accept=".pdf,.docx" OnFilesSelected="@HandleFiles" />

examples.title: Custom Label and Icon
examples.code: Replace photo @* Empty ChildContent suppresses the default text label *@

slots.name: Icon
slots.description: Custom leading icon. Defaults to Lucide.Upload.

mdSummary:
# UploadTrigger

Upload Trigger component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/upload-trigger

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| UploadTrigger | OnFilesSelected | `EventCallback<InputFileChangeEventArgs>` | `` | Files chosen in the picker. Fires once per picker confirmation; the consumer is responsible for any subsequent state / upload logic. |
| UploadTrigger | Multiple | `bool` | `` | Allow multiple files. Maps to the native picker's multi-select. |
| UploadTrigger | Accept | `string?` | `` | MIME-type / extension filter passed to accept=. E.g. "image/*", ".pdf,.docx". Null = no filter. |
| UploadTrigger | Disabled | `bool` | `` | Disables the trigger. |
| UploadTrigger | Variant | `Button.ButtonVariant` | `Button.ButtonVariant.Default` | Visual variant. Matches the corresponding Button variant so the trigger composes visually with surrounding buttons. |
| UploadTrigger | Size | `Button.ButtonSize` | `Button.ButtonSize.Default` | Size. Matches the corresponding Button size. |
| UploadTrigger | Text | `string?` | `` | Trigger label. Falls back to localized "Pick a file" when null. Ignored if ChildContent is provided. |
| UploadTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom label content. Overrides Text. |
| UploadTrigger | Icon | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom leading icon. Defaults to Lucide.Upload. |
| UploadTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| UploadTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (UploadTrigger) — Custom label content. Overrides Text.
- `Icon` (UploadTrigger) — Custom leading icon. Defaults to Lucide.Upload.

## Events
- `OnFilesSelected` (`EventCallback<InputFileChangeEventArgs>`) — Files chosen in the picker. Fires once per picker confirmation; the consumer is responsible for any subsequent state / upload logic.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<UploadTrigger />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-destructive-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/UploadTrigger/UploadTrigger.razor`
